params.name: Pro Juventute
params.description:
On October 21, 1916, the Swiss Postal Service decided to issue a set of charity stamps.
The "Pro Juventute" stamp series is the world's first set of relief stamps dedicated to supporting children in need. All proceeds are used to assist children, ensuring they receive not only basic support but also aid during emergencies. This stamp series has contributed to the welfare of numerous children. For over a century, it has spread love and warmth globally, serving as a vivid testament to ongoing e …
